headline: $225 million development project slated for Brandon, Mississippi
summary: International Paper announced March 20 plans to construct a new 468,000-square-foot, $225 million sustainable packaging facility in Rankin County.

raw.headline: $225 million development project slated for Brandon, Mississippi

headline: International Paper to build $225M box plant in Mississippi
summary: The new build will replace a nearby aging facility. This aligns with IP’s plan for $1.9 billion in annual capital spending, especially to reconfigure its box plant network.

raw.headline: International Paper to build $225M box plant in Mississippi
raw.summary: The new build will replace a nearby aging facility. This aligns with IP’s plan for $1.9 billion in annual capital spending, especially to reconfigure its box plant network.

headline: International Paper Plans to Build New Sustainable Packaging Facility in Rankin County, Mississippi
summary: International Paper (NYSE: IP; LSE: IPC), today announced plans to construct a new 468,000-square-foot sustainable packaging facility in Rankin County, Mississippi. The investment reinforces the company's commitment to strategic growth, operational and customer excellence and long-term value creation.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on International Paper, Lowers Price Target to $38
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Gabe Hajde   maintains International Paper (NYSE:IP) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $40 to $38.
